conclusion: Current no-flag c2 default512 loaded c1, c2 serial-bridge, primitive c2 correctness, and a fresh retained-gate-shaped default512 profiler summary while preserving generated-token equality [137,137]. Batch/decode/sampler/projection blockers are empty and native_caware_decode=true; scaling references are complete (aggregate_vs_c1=0.8382, aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.0690). This refreshes required runtime evidence after the c2 stabilizer change, but no retained throughput/scaling claim is made because aggregate-vs-c1 remains below 1.0 and the profiler command was captured from a no-baseline smoke rather than the exact retained-attachment command.
